title: C4OS Grill Question 008: First MVP Workflow
description: This question closes the first customer-usable workflow after the major scope decisions. Submit the form, then paste the generated response back into chat.

questions.label: Which first MVP workflow should freeze as the primary implementation slice?
options: Open trusted folder, configure provider, start chat, agent answers with visible thinking/status
Open trusted folder, configure provider, agent reviews project files and proposes/executes code changes
Open trusted folder, configure provider, agent runs local app, uses Browser, and iterates with file/terminal changes
Open trusted folder, configure provider, install/connect extensions, then agent uses tagged extensions in chat
questions.help: Recommended neutral baseline: freeze one primary workflow and treat the others as required supporting surfaces only if they are necessary to complete that workflow.

questions.label: What result proves the workflow worked?
questions.help: Name the end state a user can verify. Example: changed file plus command output plus browser preview plus resumable session record.

questions.label: Which surfaces must be included in that workflow?
questions.help: Select only surfaces required for the first customer-usable workflow, not everything that exists in MVP settings.

questions.label: Clarifications or non-goals
questions.help: Call out anything that must not be part of the first workflow even if it remains in MVP scope.
